---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Create a report to help us improve and squash codebase issues
title: "bug: [Short description of the bug]"
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🚶 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or console terminal logs to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment Specifications
*   **Operating System**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Ubuntu]
*   **Browser (if UI bug)**: [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
*   **Python Version**: [e.g. 3.11.2]
*   **Node.js Version**: [e.g. v20.10.0]
*   **Docker Desktop Version**: [e.g. v4.26]

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context or remarks about the problem here.
